goal.statement: Upgrade frontend build to Vite 8 + Tailwind CSS 4, redesign with modern styling, verify build and visual correctness.
stopping_conditions: no broken CSS classes in built output
scope_boundaries: Do NOT change any component logic or IPC code
Do NOT modify the HTML template structure
Do NOT change Python or Rust code

backlog.title: Upgrade packages + install @tailwindcss/vite
backlog.description: Bump vite to ^8, tailwindcss to ^4, add @tailwindcss/vite plugin

backlog.title: Update build configs for Vite 8 + Tailwind 4
backlog.description: Update vite.config.js to use tailwindcss vite plugin, remove postcss/tailwind configs

backlog.title: Rewrite CSS for Tailwind 4 syntax
backlog.description: Replace @tailwind directives with @import, move custom theme to CSS @theme, verify build

backlog.title: Fix styling regressions from upgrade
backlog.description: Check rendered output, fix any broken utility classes, verify all components render correctly
